title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: xorg-x11-drv-wacom bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for xorg-x11-drv-wacom is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

full_text:
An update for xorg-x11-drv-wacom is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The xorg-x11-drv-wacom packages provide an X Window System input device driver that allows the X server to handle Wacom tablets with extended functionality.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [xorg-x11-drv-wacom] Backport Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen to RHEL9 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-106467)
